manual.description: SAS-signed HTTP trigger. CI extracts this trigger's callback URL (design 6) and injects it into the purchaser app setting SupplierAs2Endpoint__url as a Key Vault reference. Trigger name is 'manual' so the listCallbackUrl path matches design 6.

Return_200_OK.description: Minimal inbound acknowledgment. Returns 200 OK so the purchaser's outbound AS2 POST succeeds. MDN generation / AS2 Decode is deferred to a later epic (design 1, 6).
